title: Leashable Fences
description: With this datapack, you can finally decorate by leashing two fences together!
body: # Leashable Fences This datapack lets you connect two fences together using a leash! The building possibilities are endless! ## How to Use: Once the datapack is installed, all you need to do is throw a lead ontop of a fence post like this: ![Setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2e54392928553290ef0a92ac1a27cc5dae21a2a_0.webp) Then, it will create a leashknot: ![Leashknot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37462a06597a70ce21c971b597481de16905c1f3_0.webp) That's it! You can now attach another lead to the knot! To remove it, simply break the fence! ## Examples of Use: Here's some cool things you can make with this new ability... A nice little garden: ![Garden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49f887813b8b065401e716f51abd17062d185123_0.webp) A simple bridge: ![Bridge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1110bf3bf078ee6a1126599ffb3d61f04f9139b_0.webp) And a castle gate: ![Gate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fd527f727703fb7ecfd15f245244ccf19be9bd8_0.webp) The possibilities are endless! ## Final Notes Thank you so much for downloading! If you have any questions, or would just like to reach out to me, my discord is linked on the site. Have a great day :) --- Looking for a Minecraft Server Host? Use my affilate link to try Shockbyte! https://shockbyte.com/billing/aff.php?aff=10878
